note: Targeted pr-freelance pipeline scrape focused on companies hiring PR/comms (full-time or otherwise) where Mark can pitch fractional/freelance/interim/overflow as an alternative or stopgap. Window: 2026-04-23 to 2026-04-30 with funding-driven leads back to 2026-04-15 (per scoring rubric — recency points decay outside 72h). Min combined score: 55. All leads have pipeline=pr-freelance. Dedup-checked against daily-scrape-* and daily-scrape-2026-04-27-targeted reports — no overlap.

leads.name: 5WPR
leads.industry: Public Relations Agency — B2B Tech (Adtech, Martech, SaaS, AI) practice

contacts.name: 5WPR B2B Tech Practice Leadership
contacts.title: Practice president / COO (target for overflow pitch, not the VP hiring manager)

leads.notes: STRONGEST lead in this scrape. 5WPR hiring a VP for their B2B Tech practice (Adtech/Martech/SaaS/AI) is a textbook agency-overflow signal — mid-tier agencies hiring senior leadership almost always means they have more revenue than capacity. 5WPR's B2B Tech book overlaps directly with Mark's sweet spot. Mark is NOT a candidate (he's a competitor); pitch is white-label / overflow execution while the seat is open and as continuing partner after. Target the COO / practice president, NOT the VP hiring manager. Deliverable promise: senior IC capacity on fintech / B2B SaaS earned media, two-week stand-up, no internal politics, project or month-by-month retainer.

leads.name: HockeyStack
leads.industry: B2B SaaS — GTM Intelligence / Revenue Agents (agentic AI for revenue ops + prospecting)
leads.fundingStage: $50M+ post-2026-04-15 raise (Bessemer Venture Partners + Y Combinator + Uncorrelated Ventures); total funding now exceeds $50M

contacts.name: Emir Atli
contacts.title: Chief of Staff (hiring lead per LinkedIn)

leads.source: PR Newswire funding announcement + careers page check (no PR/Comms posting visible)
leads.notes: Strongest 'first PR hire' / post-funding comms-greenfield signal in this scrape. HockeyStack just raised $50M (4/15) and has no in-house comms function or visible PR posting. Same agentic-AI-for-revenue category as Actively AI ($45M Series B 4/28, already in CRM as pr-marketing). Category-defining narrative window opens now and closes in 60-90 days. Pitch fractional 60-day plant-the-flag campaign before they invest in full-time Head of Comms. Outreach: Emir Atli + founders directly via LinkedIn. The 4/15 funding date is 15 days from scrape date — recency scored 3 (would be 0 if strict on 7-day window) because the comms-build need is fresh.

leads.name: Crypto.com
leads.location: Global; major hubs Singapore, Miami, US-remote

contacts.name: Crypto.com VP/SVP Communications
contacts.title: Hiring manager for Director PR & Communications (target for interim pitch)

leads.notes: Established crypto exchange hiring Director of PR & Communications. Existing in-house comms function — this is a senior addition, not a first hire. Fractional angle is narrow: interim Director coverage during search OR specialized B2B/institutional/regulatory workstream that the existing function isn't covering. Mark's fintech credentials stronger for B2B angle than consumer crypto. Realistic odds: low. One well-targeted email worth the effort because the comp tier means a $15-25K/month interim retainer would be absorbed without flinching. Don't multi-touch — one shot.

leads.name: Courier Health
leads.industry: Biopharma CRM — life sciences / patient journey orchestration platform
leads.fundingStage: Series B $50M (2026-04-22), led by Oak HC/FT with Norwest and Work-Bench. 2025 grew customers/therapies 4x and doubled headcount.

contacts.name: Courier Health Leadership
contacts.title: CEO / CMO target via Built In NYC profile

leads.source: PR Newswire Series B announcement + careers page check
leads.notes: Healthtech / biopharma is OUTSIDE Mark's primary sweet spot (finance, legal, PE/VC, B2B SaaS). Including because the post-Series-B greenfield pattern is exactly Pitch Angle #4 and the score crosses threshold. Oak HC/FT typically pushes portfolio cos toward agency relationships in first 60 days post-raise — the comms-build window is open NOW. Decision to pursue is sector-strategic for Mark, not lead-quality-driven. If he wants to develop a healthtech adjacency, Oak HC/FT + General Catalyst Health portfolios are warm-list opportunities. If not, deprioritize without follow-up. Pitch: 30-day pilot on Series B halo + customer/therapy logo PR + post-funding category-leader narrative — 'fintech-trained discipline applied to biopharma CRM.'

contacts.name: CMCO (hired Oct 2025)
contacts.title: Chief Marketing & Customer Officer (buyer for external press workstream)

leads.notes: Boston fintech (small-business alternative lending) hiring Sr. Manager Brand & External Communication, reporting to CMCO hired Oct 2025. Bottom-up comms-function build. Hiring window is Mark's opportunity — while they search, external earned-media partner carries press-relations workstream that the future Sr. Manager will eventually own. Pitch the CMCO directly (not the founders). Position as accelerating the eventual Sr. Manager hire's onboarding, not as competition. 90-day project basis: hand off populated journalist CRM, three placed thought-leadership pieces, customer-story pipeline. Solid sector-fit (fintech/lending) and B2B trade press / SBA-adjacent media play.
